question:
Numpuses are kind. Each numpus is a wumpus. Wumpuses are not wooden. Every zumpus is not dull. Wumpuses are impuses. Impuses are not nervous. Each impus is a yumpus. Every yumpus is hot. Every yumpus is a vumpus. Every vumpus is transparent. Vumpuses are rompuses. Rompuses are not small. Rompuses are jompuses. Jompuses are dull. Jompuses are dumpuses. Each dumpus is earthy. Every dumpus is a tumpus. Fae is an impus.

Is the following statement true or false? Fae is dull.
